languages.text:
Use range for drugs and medikits is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When used on ally, drugs and medikits additionally heal for {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19}. This healing is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} if the target is in Combat Zone

traits.locale_text:
Use range for drugs and medikits is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When used on ally, drugs and medikits additionally heal for {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19}. This healing is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} if the target is in Combat Zone

languages.text:
The range at which medikits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

traits.locale_text:
The range at which medikits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's wounds, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the Combat Tactics area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

The range at which medikits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's wounds, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the Combat Tactics area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

The range at which medikits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

The range at which medikits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's wounds, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the Combat Tactics area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

The range at which medikits and stimulants can be used is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the Combat Tactics area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

languages.text:
Дальность использования медкомплектов и стимуляторов увеличивается на +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
Когда медкомплект используется для восстановления {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g} союзника, он восстанавливает на +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} больше здоровья.
Когда используется стимулятор, он восстанавливает {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} здоровья.
Если цель находится в зоне {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}стратегического плана{/g}, это значение увеличивается на +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

When a medikit is used to restore an ally's {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, it restores +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} more wounds.
When a stimulant is used, it restores {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} wounds.
If the target is within the {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Combat Tactics{/g} area, this value is increased by +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

Дальность использования медкомплектов и стимуляторов увеличивается на +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.

languages.text:
Incrementa en +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus} el alcance al que pueden utilizarse botiquines y estimulantes.
Cuando se utiliza un botiquín para restablecer las {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} de un aliado, se recuperan {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} heridas adicionales.
Cuando se utiliza un estimulante, restablece {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} heridas.
Si el objetivo está dentro de la zona designada por {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tácticas de combate{/g}, esta cifra aumenta en +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

Si el objetivo está dentro de la zona designada por {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tácticas de combate{/g}, esta cifra aumenta en +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

languages.text:
Die Reichweite von Medikits und Stimulanzien wird um +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus} erhöht.
Wird ein Medikit genutzt, um {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g} eines Verbündeten zu heilen, regeneriert es +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} mehr Wunden.
Wird ein Stimulans verwendet, regeneriert es {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} Wunden.
Befindet sich das Ziel im {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Gefechtstaktiken{/g}-Bereich, erhöht sich dieser Wert um +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

languages.text:
Sıhhiye çantaları ve uyarıcıların kullanım menzili, +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus} artar.
Bir dost birimin {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanını tazelemek için sıhhiye çantası kullanıldığında +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} daha fazla sağlık puanı tazelenir.
Uyarıcı kullanıldığında {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} sağlık puanı tazelenir.
Hedef, {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Çatışma Taktikleri{/g} alanında bulunuyorsa bu değer +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus} artar.

Uyarıcı kullanıldığında {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} sağlık puanı tazelenir.

languages.text:
La distance à laquelle les médikits et stimulants peuvent être utilisés est augmentée de +{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}.
Lorsqu'un médikit est utilisé pour restaurer les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} d'un allié, il lui rend +{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} blessures supplémentaires.
L'utilisation d'un stimulant rend {uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19} blessures.
Si la cible se trouve dans une zone de {g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}Tactiques de combat{/g}, cette valeur est augmentée de +{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}.

languages.text:
医疗包和兴奋剂的使用距离增加{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}。
使用医疗包恢复盟友{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}时，额外恢复{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19}点生命值。
使用兴奋剂时，恢复{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19}点生命值。
如果目标位于{g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}战斗策略{/g}的范围内，此项数值额外增加{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}。

languages.text:
メディキットおよびスティミュラントを使用できる射程が+{unit_stat|WarhammerStrength|bonus}増加する。
メディキットで味方の{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}負傷{/g}を回復する際、回復量が+{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19}増加する。
スティミュラントを使用すると、{uip|Heal|0987bac05d5a4a6c940efcd927a1cf19}の負傷を回復する。
対象が{g|f:e4e45f74936c4740b7bc03013f6991ba}戦闘戦術{/g}の範囲内にいる場合、この値が+{unit_stat|WarhammerIntelligence|bonus}増加する。
